prompt: I'm building a 'Dashboard' feature. It needs a sidebar, header, several charts, and a user settings modal. How should I organize the folders and components for this?

assertions.name: proposes_feature_structure
assertions.text: Does the output propose a feature-based folder structure?

assertions.name: separates_layout
assertions.text: Does the output separate layout components from feature components?

assertions.name: follows_output_format
assertions.text: Does the output follow the 3-part structure defined in the skill?
